LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHARLES JAKOB'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE ADDITIONAL PARTIES FOR DOES; TO ALLOW SERVICE BY PUBLICATION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE REQUEST TO AMEND TO SUBSTITUTE ADDITIONAL PARTIES IS GRANTED AND THE REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE BY PUBLICATION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RE-FILING THE REQUEST WITH DEPARTMENT 206. LOCAL RULE 3.3C(2) REQUIRES THAT THE REQUEST FOR SERVICE BY PUBLICATION BE MADE TO THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARCO ACOSTA, TEL. NO. 676-9461 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CYNDI K. WONG OF RAIFSNIDER LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 398-9001 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MR 18, INC. DBA MICHAEL FINE ART AND ANTIQUES Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case IS Granted. Opposition was filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint To Substitute Additional Parties For Does; To Allow Service By Publication
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CYNDI K. WONG OF THE RAIFSNIDER LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 398-9001 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CHARLES JAKOB'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint To Substitute Additional Parties For Does; To Allow Service By Publication IS Granted in part. The request to amend to substitute additional parties is granted and the request to allow service by publication is denied without prejudice to re-filing the request with department 206. Local Rule 3.3C(2) requires that the request for service by publication be made to the presiding judge's department. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK
